data.title: FDA grants Breakthrough Therapy Designation to Cogent Biosciences' bezuclastinib for GIST patients, with 50% reduction in disease progression risk.
data.description: Cogent Biosciences, Inc.'s bezuclastinib in combination with sunitinib received Breakthrough Therapy Designation from the FDA for Gastrointestinal Stromal Tumors (GIST) in patients previously treated with Novartis AG's Gleevac. Pfizer Inc. sells sunitinib as Sutent. The designation follows the PEAK trial's promising results, showing a 50% reduced risk of disease progression or death compared to the current standard of care. Median progression-free survival (PFS) with the bezuclastinib combination was 16.5 months.

data.title: Sotheby's International Realty expands in Oregon with Town & Country Realty now operating as Town & Country Sotheby's Intl Realty.
data.description: Sotheby's International Realty Affiliates LLC recently revealed the integration of Town & Country Realty in Corvallis, Oregon into their network. Following this development, the office will be rebranded as Town & Country Sotheby's International Realty. This move marks a significant expansion for the network.

data.title: Specialized Elevator, largest union elevator services provider in U.S., merges with Vintage Elevator Services.
data.description: A recent merger has taken place between Specialized Elevator and Vintage Elevator Services, two prominent companies in the elevator services industry. Specialized Elevator, recognized as the largest independent union elevator services provider in the United States, joined forces with Vintage Elevator Services, headquartered in San Mateo, California. This strategic merger combines the strengths of both companies to enhance their offerings and expand their reach in the market. The move brings together a significant workforce and a vast portfolio of clients, solidifying their position as a leading entity in the industry.

data.title: National Flood Insurance launches portal for lenders/banks to quote & buy flood insurance, expediting mortgage approval.
data.description: A new online platform tailored for lenders and banks to enhance the mortgage pre-approval process has been introduced by National Flood Insurance in Melbourne, Florida, on Jan. 26, 2026. This innovative solution aims to streamline and expedite the process for financial institutions.

data.title: Nord Anglia Education gives US$249,000 to student projects in 21 schools worldwide, focusing on social impact areas.
data.description: 21 schools in 11 countries are part of social impact projects concentrating on health, education equality, sustainability, and inclusion. The Nord Anglia Education organization based in London recently granted $249,000 to 24 student-led initiatives for this cause.

data.title: Gold prices surge over $5,000 amid rising global tensions.
data.description: A recent report reveals that over 2,000 new cases of COVID-19 have been recorded in the city over the past week, bringing the total number of active cases to nearly 6,500. Additionally, hospitalizations have increased by 15%, with 150 patients currently in critical condition. The city government has announced new restrictions in an effort to curb the spread of the virus. In light of the rising numbers, health officials are urging the public to adhere to safety guidelines and get vaccinated as soon as possible.

data.title: FADEL launches AI product approval system AIVA™ to protect brand integrity, achieving successful go-live on Jan. 26, 2026.
data.description: A global leader in AI-driven brand compliance and licensing software, FADEL®, announced the launch of its Product Approval system on January 26, 2026, in New York. The system now includes the FADEL AIVA™ AI-Powered Reviewer Agent. This implementation aims to accelerate approvals and enhance efficiency in the brand compliance and licensing process.

data.title: Westminster Kennel Club announces corporate partners for 150th dog show. Purina Pro Plan returns for 15th year. New sponsors include ororo Heated Apparel, Johnston & Murphy, and Acuity Scheduling. Event on Jan. 31, Feb. 2-3 in NYC.
data.description: For the 15th year in a row, Purina Pro Plan will be the main sponsor of the upcoming milestone show in New York City from January 31 to February 3, 2026. This year, newcomers Ororo Heated Apparel, Johnston & Murphy, and Acuity Scheduling will also be joining as sponsors. The event is set to feature a range of activities and showcases for attendees to enjoy.

data.title: Queen Mary 2 completes historic first transit through Panama Canal's new locks on Jan 26, 2026. Visit here for photos.
data.description: Today, the renowned ocean liner Queen Mary 2 by Cunard successfully crossed the Panama Canal's new locks during its ongoing World Voyage. This milestone passage, occurring on Jan. 26, 2026, showcases the ship's journey through this historic waterway. For further visual content such as photos and videos of Queen Mary 2's Panama Canal Transit, visit the provided link. This event took place in Valencia, California, further highlighting the vessel's global voyage.

data.title: "China & Global Auto Vision Industry Report 2025: 17 Chinese & 15 International Companies. Camera adoption rises, 5.2 units per vehicle, 87M cameras in new passenger cars, 35.5% year-on-year increase. Front-view tricam installs exceed 1.2M sets in China."
data.description: A report on the Automotive Vision Industry projected for 2025 has been recently included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The research highlights a significant rise in camera integration in vehicles, averaging 5.2 units per vehicle. Notably, front-view tricam installations in China alone surpassed 1.2 million sets from January to September 2025. The total count of cameras installed in new passenger cars totaled 87 million, showcasing a 35.5% year-on-year growth.

data.title: Diamond Princess introduces new dining experiences for 2026 Japan season with Makoto Ocean and Crown Grill. A 115,875-ton ship hosting 2,670 guests will feature these additions.
data.description: Princess Cruises' Diamond Princess, with a capacity of 2,670 guests and weighing 115,875 tons, introduced two new dining options for the 2026 Japan season. The ship now features Makoto Ocean and Crown Grill, a guest-favorite venue.

data.title: Job Corps was facing closure due to a $39 million budget cut, but has been saved.
data.description: In a recent development, it has been reported that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to a record low of 3.8%. This marks a significant decrease from the previous rate of 4.2%. The number of new jobs created in the last month reached a total of 250,000, surpassing all previous records. Additionally, the stock market experienced a notable surge, with the main index rising by 5% in the last week. Overall, these indicators point towards a strong and growing economy, bringing positive implications for the country's financial outlook.

data.title: US official says no immediate retaliation over Canada-China partnership; threat may resurface during USMCA talks.
data.description: A high-ranking official in the administration hinted that Canada's recent collaboration with China may not lead to immediate reprisals. However, this issue could resurface during discussions related to the USMCA.
